name: SuperTokens
tagline: SuperTokens is an open source user authentication solution. More details: https://supertokens.com
description:
SuperTokens is an open source user authentication solution. More details: https://supertokens.com


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  supertokens-postgres:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    volumes:
      - supertokens-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: supertokens
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 9cc81d7b89b8b162
      POSTGRES_DB: supertokens
  supertokens:
    depends_on:
      - supertokens-postgres
    image: supertokens/supertokens-postgresql:7.0
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      API_KEYS: 828df1203a7c05a6d7972f07943cd0ea52c701153f254a702c6053986f76ec7c
      DISABLE_TELEMETRY: true
      POSTGRESQL_CONNECTION_URI: postgresql://supertokens:9cc81d7b89b8b162@supertokens-postgres:5432/supertokens
    ports:
      - 42118:3567
volumes:
  supertokens-postgres-data: null
